title: Hagen Theatre
summary: Hagen Theatre (German: Theater Hagen) is a performance venue in Hagen, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. It offers musical theatre (opera, operetta, musicals), ballet, plays, children's and young people's theatre, and concerts by the Philharmonic Orchestra Hagen.
